title: Hello, World
excerpt: Welcome to Hundred Acre Wood — a record of projects, experiments, and things I'm building.
content:
# Hello, World

Welcome to **Hundred Acre Wood** — my personal corner of the internet.

This is a space where I document projects I'm working on, share things I've learned, and think out loud about work and craft.

## What to expect

- Write-ups on software projects
- Notes on things I'm learning
- Occasional musings on life and work

More posts coming soon. Thanks for stopping by.
